mapper.select: /* RcpSimpMgmtMapper.getExclusiveRateList */ SELECT '1' AS additionChecked , A.EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 AS additionKey , A.EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 AS exclusiveKey , A.EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 AS msg FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP A WHERE A.CD_GROUP_ID = 'additionbeta'

/* RcpSimpMgmtMapper.getRcpSimpRsvTlphNoByInfo */ SELECT A.TLPH_NO_STAT_CD AS tlphNoStatCd , A.ASGN_AGNC_ID AS asgnAgncId , A.TLPH_NO_OWN_CMPN_CD AS tlphNoOwnCmpnCd , A.OPEN_SVC_IND_CD AS openSvcIndCd , A.ENCD_TLPH_NO AS encdTlphNo , A.TLPH_NO AS tlphNo FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP A WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0') AND SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = A.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'NU2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000' AND IF_TYPE = 'RSV') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = A.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'NU2' AND SEQ > A.SEQ AND IF_TYPE = 'RRS')

/* osstCallMapper.getOsstRsltMsg */
SELECT LISTAGG('[' || (CASE WHEN A.PRGR_STAT_CD = 'NU2' THEN DECODE(A.IF_TYPE, 'RSV', '예약요청', 'RRS', '예약취소', '예약결과') ELSE FN_GET_CODENM('RCP2040', A.PRGR_STAT_CD) END) || '] ' || NVL(RSLT_MSG, '정상처리'), chr(13) || chr(10)) WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY A.SEQ DESC) AS rsltMsg FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP A WHERE A.MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, 0) GROUP BY A.MVNO_ORD_NO
